patch:
--- a/comparator_32bit.sv
+++ b/comparator_32bit.sv
@@ -12,10 +12,9 @@ module control_unit (
   wire [31:0] extended_a = {16'b0, addr_a[15:0]};
   comparator_32bit cmp (
     .data_x(extended_a),
     .data_y(addr_b[31:0]),
-    .eq_flag(match),
-    .extra_port(1'b0)
+    .eq_flag(match)
   );
 endmodule
